line_1: Radiant and reddening, through the scattered haze.
line_2: And the sole sun his rising orb displays,

line_1: Now seen distinct, through the disparting haze,
line_2: The glittering file its bannered length displays;

line_1: Her gray sail mingles with the morning haze,
line_2: That down the channel as serene she strays,

line_1: Yet thy still orb, seen through the freezing haze,
line_2: Shines calm and clear without; and whilst I gaze,

line_1: Streams all diffusive through the opening haze!
line_2: How beautiful the sun, as still we gaze,
